      gettext(
          "  -t, --tabs=LIST  use comma separated list of tab positions.\n"),
      stdout);
  fputs_unlocked(
      gettext(
          "                     The last specified position can be prefixed "
          "with '/\n"
          "                     to specify a tab size to use after the last\n"
          "                     explicitly specified tab stop.  Also a prefix "
          "of '+'\n"
          "                     can be used to align remaining tab stops "
          "relative to\n"
          "                     the last specified tab stop instead of the "
          "first column\n"),
      stdout);
}
